# AIQuota

> AIQuota is a native macOS menu bar app for monitoring OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage quotas.

AIQuota shows 5-hour and 7-day usage windows, reset timers, plan details, credits, and warning states. It supports single-service or dual-service setups and includes macOS desktop widgets and notifications.

AIQuota requires macOS 15 or later. It is available as a direct download from GitHub.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://aiquota.app/): Product overview, features, download, and FAQ
- [Releases](https://aiquota.app/releases/): Current and recent release information
- [Privacy Policy](https://aiquota.app/privacy/): Data access, storage, analytics, and privacy details
- [Terms of Service](https://aiquota.app/terms/): Terms for using AIQuota
- [Accessibility](https://aiquota.app/accessibility/): Website and app accessibility statement
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/niederme/ai-quota): Source code, documentation, issues, and releases
- [Latest Download](https://github.com/niederme/ai-quota/releases/latest/download/AIQuota.zip): Latest macOS build

## Product Facts

- Platform: macOS 15 or later
- Providers monitored: OpenAI Codex and Claude Code
- Interfaces: Menu Bar gauges, popover details, desktop widgets, and notifications
- Usage windows: 5-hour and 7-day
- Data handling: Auth material is stored locally in Keychain; prompts and code are not read
- Analytics: Optional anonymous usage analytics are disabled by default
- Support: help@aiquota.app
